expectations.text: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
expectations.evidence: Zero data-testid attributes found in any component

expectations.text: Images use data-asset placeholder convention (not placeholder URLs)
expectations.evidence: No data-asset attributes found. Uses inline placeholder divs without the data-asset convention

expectations.text: Zustand state in dedicated store file with selector hooks (no bare useStore)
expectations.evidence: cart-store.ts with Zustand. 4 exported selectors. No bare useStore() calls

expectations.text: Page decomposed into multiple focused components (not monolithic)
expectations.evidence: 16 files total: 10 TSX components + 6 TS modules. Good separation of concerns

expectations.text: Uses Tailwind v4 patterns (shadow-xs, inset-ring, focus-visible:, @theme)
expectations.evidence: Zero Tailwind v4 specific patterns found. Uses standard Tailwind classes only
Zero instances of ': any', 'as any', or '<any>' found

expectations.text: Responsive design with mobile breakpoint handling
expectations.evidence: 7 responsive breakpoint classes. Mobile filter drawer, adaptive grid
